'''Tocoya''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located within the [[Tocoya system/Legends|Tocoya system]] of the [[Inner Rim/Legends|Inner Rim]] and the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the [[Tocoyan]] race. [[Neb Dulo]], a disciple of the [[religion]] [[Davrilat]], was from the planet.
